clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Youth referred to Daejeon residents aged 19 to 34.

clauses.title: Required Documents for Participation Programs
clauses.text: Applicants had to submit resident registration, a participation plan, and proof of local residence.

clauses.title: Annual Implementation Plan Deadline
clauses.text: The mayor announced the annual youth implementation plan by February 28.

clauses.title: Project Support Amount Standard
clauses.text: Project support amount was up to 5000000 KRW per team.
